requirements.summary: Fix the AuthPromptBar to correctly manage dismissed state, ensuring it only shows 'Sign in was dismissed' when explicitly dismissed by the user during the current session, and resets when new protected actions are triggered
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the app or performing a protected action does not show a 'dismissed' message unless the user actually dismissed the bar in the same session.
Triggering a new protected action after a previous dismissal re-shows the prompt bar in its default (non-dismissed) state.
The dismissed state is reset when the user navigates away or a new auth prompt is triggered.
No stale dismissed state persists across page reloads or new sessions.

file_operations.description: Review the AuthPromptContext implementation to ensure the dismissed state is properly scoped to individual prompt sessions and resets when a new protected action is triggered. Ensure the context value includes a mechanism to clear the dismissed flag when showAuthPrompt is called again.

Fix the logic that determines when to display the 'Sign in was dismissed' message. Ensure the dismissed state is tied to the current prompt session and is cleared when the bar is shown again due to a new protected action. The bar should only show the dismissal message if the user explicitly clicked dismiss during the current visible session, not from a previous interaction.
